query: Okay stop kitchen dishwasher 1, it is finished. Also turn on bathroom light 1, it is a bit dim in there.
Okay, I'm starting dinner and it's a bit dim, so turn on kitchen light 1 now.
I'm starting a load in the laundry and it's a bit dark in there, so please turn on the utility room light 1.
Okay I'm starting dinner so turn on the kitchen light 1 now. The kitchen dishwasher 1 finished its cycle, stop it. The towels are dry so stop the bathroom dryer 1.
Alright, I just brought in groceries and want things chilled, set kitchen refrigerator 1 to 2.0 degrees Celsius please.
Looks a bit humid in the utility room, so turn the utility room dehumidifier 1 on and set the fan to eighty percent. The laundry's done, stop the utility room dryer 1 now.
Okay I need some light to get dressed so turn on bedroom light 1. Also start playing bedroom TV 1, I will watch while I get ready. Thanks.
Okay quick favor the clothes are dry stop utility room dryer 1 now and dinner is done stop kitchen dishwasher 1 too
Okay, kids are in there, start the kids room TV 1 playing. Quick clean while they watch, start the kids room robot vacuum 1 running. Laundry's done, stop bathroom washer 1.
It is getting warm with the morning sun, turn on living room fan 1 and set the fan to 30 percent.
Alright I want to read in the living room so turn on the living room light 1.

Okay, I am getting lunch ready so turn on dining room light 1. The utility room feels a bit stuffy so turn utility room air purifier 1 on and set the fan to 40 percent. Also stop utility room washer 2 because its cycle is finished.
It is getting chilly in the office this evening, set office heat pump 1 to heating mode. The wash cycle is done, set bathroom washer 1 to stopped.
Alright, the kitchen still smells like lunch so kitchen air purifier 1 on, set the fan to forty percent, and turn on kitchen light 1. Also put on living room TV 1 and start playing.
Okay I am getting ready and want some light and background noise. Turn on Bedroom light 1 and start playing on Bedroom TV 1. I am also checking the laundry so turn on Utility room light 1.

Okay, it's a bit warm in the morning so power on the living room fan 1 and set the fan to 80 percent. Also power on the kitchen fan 1 and set the fan to 80 percent, I'll be cooking soon. And power on the bathroom light 1 so the mirror is lit.
Okay I am starting dinner so turn on kitchen light 1 and set kitchen refrigerator 1 to 5.0 degrees Celsius. Then switch on bathroom light 1 so I can check the mirror.
Okay, set the kitchen freezer 1 to negative twenty two point zero degrees Celsius. Just restocked a big batch of meat so keep it icy cold.

Alright I am getting things ready for the weekend so set the kitchen freezer 1 to negative 19.0 degrees Celsius to make sure the food stays extra cold. Also turn on the living room light 1 I want the living room lit for the afternoon.
Hey, set living room blinds 1 to 10.0 percent closed, I want a little morning light. Also stop utility room washer 1 now, set it to stopped so I can take the laundry out.
Laundry's finished so please stop washer 1 in the utility room. It's getting dark, turn on the living room light 1.
It is getting warm this late morning, please turn on AC 2 in the living room, set it to cooling mode and set the fan to thirty percent.
It is getting warm this afternoon. Turn on the living room fan 2 and set it to 60 percent please.
It's cooling off tonight and the laundry's still damp, warm up the utility room. Set heat pump 1 in the utility room to heating mode.

It's getting warm in the living room, please turn on the living room AC 1, set it to cooling mode and set the fan to 40 percent. Also, I need light in the dining area while I finish up, so turn on the dining room light 2.
Looks humid in the bedroom this morning. Turn on dehumidifier 1 in the bedroom and set the fan to 80 percent to dry it out.
We are eating in a few minutes so cool the dining room a bit. Turn on dining room AC 1 and set mode to cooling and fan to forty percent.

Kitchen's gotten steamy from cooking, kitchen dehumidifier 1 power on and fan to 60 percent. Living room is a bit bright, living room blinds 1 set to 70 percent closed. We had showers earlier, bathroom dehumidifier 1 power on and fan to 60 percent.
Kitchen is a bit dim so please turn on kitchen light 1. I am finished with the laundry so stop utility room dryer 1.

Bathroom is a bit stuffy from the shower, so turn bathroom air purifier 1 on and set the fan to eighty percent. The kitchen should be warm for cooking, set kitchen heat pump 1 to heating mode. Keep the laundry area cool, power on utility room AC 1, set it to cooling and set the fan to eighty percent.
The dining area feels dry, please power on dining room humidifier 2 and set the fan to forty percent. Also set kitchen refrigerator 1 to 4.0 degrees Celsius so the food stays fresh.

Hey, it's a bit stuffy this morning, turn the living room air purifier 1 on and set its fan to 30 percent. And in the bedroom put the bedroom TV 1 on and start it playing so I can catch the morning news.
Sun's strong while I'm cooking so set kitchen blinds 1 to 40.0% closed. The laundry's finished, please stop bathroom dryer 1.

It's getting warm in the office this evening, so turn on AC 1 in the office, set it to cooling and put the fan at seventy percent. Set freezer 1 in the kitchen to minus eighteen point zero degrees Celsius to keep everything fully frozen overnight.
Okay, I'm putting ice cream away so set freezer 1 in the kitchen to temp -18.0°C right now.
Okay, turn on living room light 1 now. I am almost ready and need it lit for when I walk through.
It's a bit dim in the living room, please turn on the living room light 1 so I can read.
The living room feels a bit muggy so please turn on dehumidifier 2 in the living room and set the fan to 70 percent. The laundry is finished so stop dryer 1 in the utility room.

Okay the bathroom's a bit steamy so turn on bathroom light 1 and turn on bathroom air purifier 1 and set its fan to 80 percent. The utility room could use more airflow so turn on utility room fan 1 and set its fan to 80 percent.
Okay, it's getting dark in the kitchen. Turn on kitchen light 1 please.
Utility room's humid from the laundry, please power on dehumidifier 1 in the utility room and set the fan to 70 percent. It's getting dark in the living room, power on the living room light 1.
Okay evening humidity picked up so run it in the office. Office dehumidifier 1 power on and set the fan to 80 percent.

Okay start with the kitchen because the kitchen is warm after cooking. Turn kitchen AC 1 on set it to cooling and fan 60 percent. Next stop utility room washer 2 I need to unload it now. Finally turn living room fan 1 on set the fan to 60 percent so the living room feels comfortable.
Okay, getting the dining room ready for lunch, turn on the dining room light 1. While I fold clothes, reduce the glare in the laundry area, set utility room blinds 1 to 20.0% closed.
Hey, the bathroom is a bit dim so please turn on the bathroom light 1 now so I can check the towels. Also start the living room robot vacuum 1 and have it run for a quick afternoon tidy.

Sun's low and there's a bit of glare in the office so dim it down, set office blinds 1 to 85.0 percent closed. It's getting warm in the living room, so turn on living room AC 1, set it to cooling mode and set the fan to 70 percent.

Hey Google, I am starting laundry so I need the utility room bright, please turn on utility room light 1. Also keep the living room comfortable with a gentle breeze, turn on living room fan 1 and set the fan to 30 percent.

Okay, quick tidy before guests arrive, run robot vacuum 2 in the living room. I need to swap laundry, stop washer 1 in the utility room. Also power on light 2 in the utility room so I can see what I am doing.
The kids need light for homework so turn on kids room light 1. It is warm in the kitchen this afternoon so turn on kitchen AC 1 and set it to cooling mode with the fan at sixty percent.
Bringing in groceries so I need better light, turn on kitchen light 1. Also set kitchen refrigerator 1 to 3.0 degrees Celsius so the new food chills.
